goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range and should be in the centre. The restaurant should serve russian food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 16:30 on sunday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a train. The train should go to birmingham new street and should leave on monday. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 12:45. Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and train ID

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for a cheap place to dine in the centre of Cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: If you are interested in Chinese food, there is Rice House located at 88 Mill Road City Centre in the cheap price range.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I prefer Russian food actually.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I can't find any cheap Russian restaurants.  Are you open to moderate price?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No. It really does need to be cheap. What about chinese in the centre?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 3 restaurants matching that, Charlie Chan, Rice House, and Golden House.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I want to book a Golden House table for 1 person at 16:30 on sunday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Great your reservation is all set, the reference number is D6VCX5IA

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Could you also help me book a train for Monday?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'd be glad to help, where are you traveling to?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am traveling to birmingham new street

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have five trains going that way. What time would you like to leave?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'd like to leave Cambridge and arrive by 12:45

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have booked you for trainID TR1111 for 23.60 pounds. It will arrive to Cambridge at approximately 11:51.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay, what is the departure time and travel time?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your train will leave at 11:00 and travel for approximately 51 minutes. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that will be all, thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: thank you for calling.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: thank you good bye.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome, and goodbye.

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a restaurant. goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from kings lynn. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the north and should serve chinese food. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range.
